---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for SocialAI Pro
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: ''
---

## 🚀 Feature Description

**A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.**

## 💡 Problem Statement

**What problem does this feature solve? What need does it address?**

## 🎯 Proposed Solution

**Describe the solution you'd like to see implemented.**

## 🔄 User Story

**As a [type of user], I want [goal] so that [reason].**

Example:
*As a social media manager, I want to schedule posts in bulk so that I can plan my content calendar more efficiently.*

## 📋 Acceptance Criteria

**What specific requirements must be met for this feature to be considered complete?**

- [ ] Requirement 1
- [ ] Requirement 2
- [ ] Requirement 3

## 🎨 UI/UX Mockups

**If applicable, add mockups, wireframes, or sketches of the proposed feature.**

## 🔧 Technical Considerations

### Implementation Approach
**Any thoughts on how this could be implemented?**

### Dependencies
**Are there any external services, APIs, or libraries this feature would require?**

### Performance Impact
**How might this feature affect application performance?**

## 📊 Priority & Impact

### Business Value
- [ ] High (significant user value, competitive advantage)
- [ ] Medium (useful feature, good to have)
- [ ] Low (nice to have, minor improvement)

### Implementation Complexity
- [ ] Low (few hours to implement)
- [ ] Medium (few days to implement)
- [ ] High (weeks to implement)

### User Impact
- [ ] All users
- [ ] Specific user type: _____________
- [ ] Optional feature for interested users

## 🔗 Related Features

**Does this feature relate to any existing features or other feature requests?**

## 🌐 Alternatives Considered

**Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.**

## 📱 Platform Considerations

**Which platforms should this feature support?**

- [ ] Web Application
- [ ] Mobile (if mobile app exists)
- [ ] All social media platforms
- [ ] Specific platforms: _____________

## 🎭 User Personas

**Which user types would benefit from this feature?**

- [ ] Individual content creators
- [ ] Small business owners
- [ ] Marketing agencies
- [ ] Enterprise teams
- [ ] All user types

## 📈 Success Metrics

**How would we measure the success of this feature?**

- User adoption rate
- Feature usage frequency
- User feedback scores
- Performance metrics
- Other: _____________

## 🤝 Contribution

**Would you like to help implement this feature?**

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to work on this
- [ ] I can help with design/mockups
- [ ] I can help with testing
- [ ] I can provide feedback during development
- [ ] No, just suggesting

## 💭 Additional Context

**Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here.**

### Examples from Other Tools
**Are there similar features in other tools that work well?**

### User Feedback
**Have other users requested this feature? Any supporting evidence?**

---

**📝 Note for Contributors:**
Please check if a similar feature request already exists before creating a new one. If you find a similar request, please add your thoughts and use cases to that discussion instead.
